top_themes.label: App Crashes on Portfolio Screen
top_themes.description: Users report the app crashes frequently when opening the portfolio or placing orders, leading to frustration and lost trust.

top_themes.label: KYC Process Is Slow and Confusing
top_themes.description: Multiple users complain about the lengthy and opaque KYC verification process, causing delays in account activation.

top_themes.label: Clean UI Makes Investing Simple
top_themes.description: Users praise the clean, intuitive interface that makes investing accessible for beginners.

quotes.body: The app crashes every time I try to open my portfolio showing a black screen
KYC took three weeks and I still cannot invest my money
Clean and intuitive interface makes investing very simple for complete beginners

action_ideas.title: Fix Portfolio Screen Crash
action_ideas.description: Investigate and resolve the crash triggered when users open the portfolio view, especially on Android.

action_ideas.title: Streamline KYC Flow
action_ideas.description: Reduce KYC turnaround time and add in-app status tracking so users know their verification progress.

what_this_solves.value: Reliable portfolio access without crashes, enabling confident first investments
Faster KYC approval so they can start trading without delays
Clear priority list of stability issues to address in the next sprint
